SEARCH
Package io.github.simplejdbcmapper.relationship

Class ToMany<T,U>

java.lang.Object
io.github.simplejdbcmapper.relationship.ToMany<T,U>
Type Parameters:
T - The main object type
U - The related object type
All Implemented Interfaces:
PopulateSpec, ThroughSpec, ToManySpec
public class ToMany<T,U> extends Object implements ToManySpec, ThroughSpec, PopulateSpec
This handles the toMany relationship including toMany through an intermediate table.
Author:
Antony Joseph

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PopulateSpec
    ids(String mainObjIdProperty, String relatedObjIdProperty)
    The id property names whose values are used to match the corresponding property values of properties configured in the ToManySpec.through(java.util.List<?>, java.lang.String, java.lang.String) method (intermediate table info) of the relationship.
    PopulateSpec
    joinOn(String mainObjIdProperty, String relatedObjFkProperty)
    The properties on each list whose values should be matched to populate the toMany relationship.
    void
    populate(String mainObjPropertyToPopulate)
    This is the terminal method of the API.
    ThroughSpec
    through(List<?> intermediateList, String fkPropertyToMainObjId, String fkPropertyToRelatedObjId)
    The 'through' information when defining a toMany relationship through an intermediate table (one side of many to many).

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • joinOn

      public PopulateSpec joinOn(String mainObjIdProperty, String relatedObjFkProperty)
      Description copied from interface: ToManySpec
      The properties on each list whose values should be matched to populate the toMany relationship. The java type of both the properties have to be exactly the same. For example one should not be Long and the other an Integer.
      Specified by:
      joinOn in interface ToManySpec
      Parameters:
      mainObjIdProperty - The main object id
      relatedObjFkProperty - The related object foreign key used for matching
      Returns:
      The populateSpec

    • through

      public ThroughSpec through(List<?> intermediateList, String fkPropertyToMainObjId, String fkPropertyToRelatedObjId)
      Description copied from interface: ToManySpec
      The 'through' information when defining a toMany relationship through an intermediate table (one side of many to many).
      Specified by:
      through in interface ToManySpec
      Parameters:
      intermediateList - The intermediate table list
      fkPropertyToMainObjId - the foreign key property that matches the main object's id
      fkPropertyToRelatedObjId - The foreign key property that matches the related object's id
      Returns:
      the ThroughSpec

    • ids

      public PopulateSpec ids(String mainObjIdProperty, String relatedObjIdProperty)
      Description copied from interface: ThroughSpec
      The id property names whose values are used to match the corresponding property values of properties configured in the ToManySpec.through(java.util.List<?>, java.lang.String, java.lang.String) method (intermediate table info) of the relationship.
      Specified by:
      ids in interface ThroughSpec
      Parameters:
      mainObjIdProperty -
      relatedObjIdProperty -
      Returns:
      PopulateSpec

    • populate

      public void populate(String mainObjPropertyToPopulate)
      Description copied from interface: PopulateSpec
      This is the terminal method of the API. Once invoked the relationship gets processed and the target property gets set.

      For a toMany relationship the target property always has to be a List.

      Specified by:
      populate in interface PopulateSpec
      Parameters:
      mainObjPropertyToPopulate - the target property on the main object which needs to be populated.
